rationale: The ensures is `antecedent ==> det_equal`; the prior attempt asserted conjuncts of the antecedent directly, but those facts are not in the proof context until the implication is opened. Wrap the whole prelude in `if (antecedent) { ... }` so every conjunct becomes a hypothesis inside the branch, then re-assert each conjunct on both sides and the cross-side domain/page_closure/owned_threads equalities so z3 sees the shared `pre_self_`-expressed witnesses and aligns the two forall-triggered ensures.
